headline: Christopher stays in clover as Grandad and Emily take knocks
text: Christopher had the best of it with Germany beating Ivory Coast 2-1 and Curaçao drawing 0-0, keeping him right in the hunt. Emily had a belter on paper with the Netherlands thumping Sweden 5-1, though Sweden’s the side taking the hiding. Grandad took a bit of a ding from Germany’s win over Ivory Coast. Overall, Max is still top of the pile on 11 points, with Christopher hot on his heels on 10. At the other end, Sofia remains propping up the table on 1 point, with Chris and Carolina also looking a bit ropey.
